name: alevel-physics-cie
tagline: Structured answer templates for CIE A-Level Physics (9702) exam questions
description:
Fine-tuned Qwen3-4B model that generates structured answer templates for Cambridge International A-Level Physics (9702) exam questions. Given any text-based physics question, it produces a complete answer framework: question type classification, given/required analysis, relevant formulae and principles, a step-by-step answer frame, and checking advice.

Trained on 1652 real CIE 9702 past papers (2001–2025) with answer templates generated by DeepSeek using mark-scheme context. Covers Papers 2, 4, and 5 (structured questions, A2 questions, and planning/analysis). Runs locally on any 8GB+ Apple Silicon Mac using MLX with ~4GB peak memory.
